fact_nuggets.text: Rattled (Japanese: Jitter) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations V to VII 1.1.2 Generation VIII 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations V to VII [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a Bug -, Dark -, or Ghost-type damaging move, its Speed is increased by one stage. No immunity is granted to these types of moves, however. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type multistrike move , each hit activates this Ability. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Rattled now also activates if a Pokemon with this Ability has its stats lowered by Intimidate . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Rattled has no effect outside of battle.

No immunity is granted to these types of moves, however. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type multistrike move , each hit activates this Ability. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Rattled now also activates if a Pokemon with this Ability has its stats lowered by Intimidate .
Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a dark, ghost, or bug move.
